6,291 legacy telemetry event files moved under legacy-telemetry; durable events retained

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: X1 service remains healthy after recovery

summary: Bounded audit persistence, recoverable compaction, CI compatibility, portable runtime installation, and live X1 recovery are verified for the exact commit.
